plan_type_rationale: Classifier returned light (Rule 6 fallthrough), overridden to phased: spans ASSISTANT orchestration + reference doc creation, Phase 2 is a hard stop gated on Phase 1 verification matrix.

phases.title: Verification and Pre-Flight Gap Audit
phases.description: Read-only verification phase. Confirm discovery_rag.py is callable from the create-workorder execution context, map every SKILL.md Step 3.6 contract item to its implementation status, confirm /coderef-rag-server status endpoint is reachable, and write a gap matrix. No code changes in this phase.

tasks.description: Read SKILLS/WORKFLOW/_shared/planner/discovery_rag.py and confirm: enrich_with_rag() signature matches SKILL.md Step 3.6 call contract (goal, project_dir, target_root, rag_endpoint, rag_freshness_days). Record return shape.
tasks.success_criteria: enrich_with_rag() call contract confirmed; return shape {hits, rewrote_query, lloyd_provenance, fallback_used, error, ms} matches spec

tasks.description: Read SKILLS/CORE/coderef-rag-server/SKILL.md. Confirm /coderef-rag-server status command syntax and what it outputs (endpoint, exit code, JSON shape).
tasks.success_criteria: /coderef-rag-server status contract documented; exit code for unreachable server confirmed

tasks.description: Verify CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG=1 path: import discovery_rag.py from a test invocation and confirm the module loads without error from the ASSISTANT execution context.
tasks.success_criteria: from SKILLS.WORKFLOW._shared.planner.discovery_rag import enrich_with_rag succeeds; no import errors

tasks.description: Read SKILLS/WORKFLOW/create-workorder/skill.json. Confirm whether reads[] includes discovery_rag.py. Record current reads list.
tasks.success_criteria: reads list reviewed; gap (if any) between current reads and required reads documented

tasks.description: Write Phase 1 gap matrix to coderef/workorder/wire-discovery-rag-create-workorder/gap-matrix.md. Per-item: SKILL.md Step 3.6 contract item, current status (DONE / MISSING / WIRING NEEDED), action required in Phase 2.
tasks.success_criteria: gap-matrix.md exists; every Step 3.6 contract item classified; HARD STOP: Phase 2 requires gap-matrix review

phases.title: Wire Discovery RAG into create-workorder Execution
phases.description: Apply Phase 1 gap matrix. Wire enrich_with_rag() invocation into create-workorder Step 3.6 execution layer (orchestration script). Persist discovery_rag output to context.json. Add pre-flight /coderef-rag-server status check. Create RAG-DISCOVERY-STEP.md reference doc. Confirm skill.json reads list. Test both enabled and disabled flag paths.
phases.gate: Phase 1 gap-matrix.md complete; all Step 3.6 items classified; USER/ORCHESTRATOR approval before Phase 2 begins

tasks.description: Read gap-matrix.md from Phase 1. Confirm all action items before making any change.
tasks.success_criteria: All WIRING NEEDED items confirmed; no MISSING items remain unresolved

tasks.description: In SKILLS/WORKFLOW/create-workorder/skill.json: add discovery_rag.py to reads[] if not present.

Create SKILLS/WORKFLOW/create-workorder/references/RAG-DISCOVERY-STEP.md. Content: Step 3.6 full contract (pre-flight health check via /coderef-rag-server status, feature flag check, enrich_with_rag() call, fallback handling, context.json persistence schema). This is the reference doc already cited in SKILL.md.
tasks.success_criteria: RAG-DISCOVERY-STEP.md exists with: feature flag contract, pre-flight check contract, enrich_with_rag call signature, context.json discovery_rag schema, fallback behavior table

tasks.description: Test CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG=0 path: invoke create-workorder with flag OFF; confirm discovery_rag key is absent from context.json (or discovery_rag_enabled=false). Test CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG=1 path with vectors_missing: confirm fallback_used=true, empty hits, workorder proceeds. Both paths must not block.
tasks.success_criteria: Flag=OFF: discovery_rag absent or disabled. Flag=ON + vectors_missing: fallback_used=true, no block, workorder completes

tasks.description: Commit all changes: feat(discovery-rag): wire CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG into create-workorder Step 3.6
tasks.success_criteria: Clean git commit on CODEREF-CORE workorder dir + ASSISTANT skill changes; no untracked changes
